tasks.label: copy-server
tasks.command: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'jass-vscode/server' | Out-Null; Copy-Item 'JassLanguageServer/bin/Debug/net8.0/JassLanguageServer.*' 'jass-vscode/server/'; Copy-Item 'JassLanguageServer/bin/Debug/net8.0/JassSyntaxAnalyzer.*' 'jass-vscode/server/'; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force 'JassRef' 'jass-vscode/server/JassRef'
